# [PKT-PRV-076](task-0143): Provider Data Catalog Monitoring

## Purpose

Implement provider data catalog monitoring.

## Scope

- Monitoring logic
- Indexing checks
- Alerts

## Implementation

1. Implement monitoring
2. Add indexing checks
3. Add alerts

## Acceptance Criteria

1. Monitoring works
2. Indexing checked
3. Alerts sent
